message:
fix(resilience): add loading/error states to 5 data-fetching components (#6772) (#6774)

Partial fix for #6772 — addresses 5 of 10 source components (skips 14
false-positive test files flagged by Auto-QA):

- ClusterComparisonPage: show error state when cluster fetch fails
- ClusterDetailModal: surface health-fetch error as inline banner
- FlightPlanBlueprint: display cluster-data error banner
- CardRequestDialog: per-project loading/error with retry, fix shared
  isSubmitting blocking all buttons
- FeatureRequestButton: show spinner while notifications/summaries load

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
